creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
> Or do you think it is better that I submit it directly to LLVM and then
> FreeBSD will merge it when it imports a new version of LLVM?

I think it is best to submit it to LLVM first and iterate on any feedback there first; once it's accepted the same change can be applied to the base system. This way there won't be a conflict during a future update.
